justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all of the user's time preferences throughout the conversation, including the 'perhaps later' and 'earlier' requests.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively proposed alternatives by checking the user's requested times and then offering to check other days or times when no slots were available.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent was efficient, combining information gathering and avoiding redundant questions or API calls.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was smooth and professional, with the agent maintaining a helpful tone and successfully booking the appointment.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent recovered gracefully after multiple unavailable slots, maintaining context and intelligently expanding the search based on user input.
